VERDICT: UNLIKELY
EXPLANATION: The paper "GPT-4o System Card" exists at arXiv:2410.21276, authored by OpenAI with a massive 400+ author list beginning with Aaron Hurst, Adam Lerer, etc. The cited authors (e.g., Aleksander Mądry) are part of this very large collaboration, and the automated checker's "mismatch" is due to minor name formatting differences (e.g., "Aleksander Mądry" vs. "Aleksander Mkadry") — a transliteration variant, not a fabrication.
LINK: https://arxiv.org/abs/2410.21276
